---
title: "WDPA"
author: "Caitie"
date: "2025-09-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# COUNTRY RESULTS

# Collate results

```{r}
result_files<-list.files(here("output_data/"), full.names = T)
```

# Count data

```{r}
count_results<- result_files[grep("count.c", result_files)]

total<-read.csv(count_results[[1]]) %>% 
  rename(total_wind = num_wind) %>% 
  select(-X)

count_results2<-count_results[2:length(count_results)]

count_dfs<-lapply(count_results2, read.csv)

combined_count <- do.call(rbind, count_dfs) %>% 
  rename(overlap_wind = num_wind) %>% 
  select(-X)

combined_count2<-full_join(combined_count, total, by = "rgn_key") %>% 
  mutate(overlap_wind = ifelse(is.na(overlap_wind) == T, 0, overlap_wind)) %>% 
  mutate(prop_count = overlap_wind/total_wind) %>% 
  mutate(type = ifelse(is.na(type) == T, "Non-strict MPA", type))

```

```{r}
write.csv(combined_count2, here("output_data/Collated/Combined_count_by_country.csv"))
```


# Area data

```{r}
area_results<- result_files[grep("area", result_files)]
area_results<-area_results[grep("Country", area_results, invert = T)]
#area_results<-area_results[grep("Collated", area_results, invert = T)]

area_dfs<-lapply(area_results, read.csv)

c_result_files<-result_files[grep("Country", result_files)][[1]]

ow_area<-read.csv(c_result_files)
```

```{r}
combined_area<-c()

# Only do 1:5 as wilderness is messing things up
for(i in 1:length(area_dfs)){
  df<-area_dfs[[i]]
  print(i)
  colnames(df)[4] <- "feature_km2"
  combined_area<-rbind(combined_area, df)
  
}
```
```{r}
combined_areaX<-combined_area %>% 
  select(-X) %>% 
  distinct(.)

combined_area2<-full_join(combined_areaX, ow_area, by = c("rgn_key", "buff")) %>% 
  mutate(prop_wind_int= int_km2/iso3_wind_km2) %>% 
  select(-X)

test<-combined_area2 %>% 
  select(rgn_key, buff, iso3_wind_km2) %>% 
  distinct(.)


write.csv(combined_area2, here("output_data/Collated/Combined_area_by_country.csv"))
```

```{r}
all<-full_join(combined_area2, total, by = c("rgn_key")) 
all2<-full_join(all, combined_count2, by = c("rgn_key", "type", "total_wind")) %>% 
  mutate(overlap_wind = ifelse(is.na(overlap_wind) == T, 0, overlap_wind),
        prop_count = overlap_wind/total_wind)
```

```{r}
write.csv(all2, here("output_data/Collated/Final_country_all_results.csv"))
```
